entries.title: Service Replacement in unimatrix-server Generates 26x Compile Cycles Without Targeted Test Scoping
Pre-existing pool timeout failures in unimatrix-server unit tests (GH#303)
Lazy-loading ONNX service handle: generalized state machine for any optional inference provider
contradiction scan O(N) ONNX cost: cache in ContradictionScanCache, tick writes every 4th tick, context_status reads cache
